hooks.command: input=$(cat); agent_type=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.agent_type // empty'); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [ -z "$agent_type" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct Bash from the main thread is blocked globally. Delegate: os-agent (general shell/OS), git-runner (git), test-runner (running tests)."}}'; elif [ "$agent_type" = "os-agent" ] && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|])[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"git commands should go through git-runner, not os-agent."}}'; elif [ "$agent_type" = "os-agent" ] && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'dotnet test|npm (run )?test|yarn test|pnpm test|cargo test|pytest|jest|vitest'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Test commands should go through test-runner, not os-agent."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi
